[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: Two black-and-white faces dominate the frame, with both figures leaning forward as if singing or speaking closely to the camera.

The main subject appears to be two human faces shown side by side against a dark background, each with eyes lowered and mouths open or shaped as if vocalizing, while their hands are raised toward the lower center of the image with fingers curled inward.

Setting:
The scene is indoors or in a studio-like setting is unclear, but the background is entirely dark and indistinct, with no visible surroundings. The lighting is focused and high-contrast, suggesting a close-up portrait or performance-style photograph.

Visual Details:
The left figure has long hair, a pale complexion, and an open mouth with visible teeth and a deep shadowed area around the eyes and cheeks. The right figure has very short, dark hair and a face with strong shadowing around the forehead and cheeks. Both figures wear dark clothing with visible patterned fabric or embroidered-like details near the shoulders and upper chest. Their hands are prominent in the lower portion of the image; the left hand is closer to the center with fingers curled, and the right hand is angled toward the lower middle with the fingers also curled. The overall composition is tightly cropped, symmetrical in feel, and shot from a near-front angle, emphasizing facial expressions and gestures. The image style is monochrome with a gritty, grainy texture.

Visible Text:
No important visible text detected.

Practical Summary:
The image shows two closely framed black-and-white portraits of people with lowered eyes and open mouths, along with raised hands in the foreground. The dark background and strong contrast keep attention on their faces, gestures, and clothing details.
- Hasil Ekstraksi Teks Gambar (OCR):

Pertanyaan asli user: Analyze this image for NSFW (Not Safe For Work) / pornographic content / nudity. Reply strictly in JSON format with three fields: 'nsfw' (boolean: true if it contains nudity, porn, suggestive, or nsfw content, false if it is safe/sfw), 'confidence' (number: from 0 to 100 representing the likelihood of nsfw/nudity/suggestive content), and 'label' (string: 'porn', 'nsfw', 'suggestive', or 'safe' depending on the content). Do not include markdown formatting or backticks, just raw JSON.
